growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Qureshi et al., 2000)

sec.method: highest butanol-fermentation productivity reported, at D=2.0 h-1, review text + Table 2 (cited from Qureshi et al., 2000)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Qureshi et al. (2000) ... C. beijerinckii biofilm formed on clay bricks ... At a dilution rate of 2.0 h-1, a total solvent productivity of 15.8 g/L/h was reached ... highest productivity ever reported for butanol fermentation. Table 2: BA10
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2 + text), original: Qureshi et al., 2000. Note organism is C. beijerinckii BA101 (not C. acetobutylicum). Biofilm-immobilized continuous fermentation; D=2.0 h-1 is reactor dilution rate NOT growth rate (immobilized cells). Volumetric solvent productivity 15.8 g/L/h, yield 0.38 g/g. No per-gDW or growth data.

growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Chen and Blaschek, 1999)

sec.method: volumetric productivity, review Table 2 (cited from Chen and Blaschek, 1999)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Table 2: C. beijerinckii BA101 | Biofilm-immobilized cells, batch fermentation | 20.9 g/L | 0.41 g/g | 0.59 g/L/h | Chen and Blaschek, 1999.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2), original: Chen and Blaschek, 1999. C. beijerinckii BA101 biofilm batch fermentation. Butanol titer 20.9 g/L, solvent yield 0.41 g/g, productivity 0.59 g/L/h. No growth rate or per-gDW uptake/secretion data.

growth_records.medium: not stated (review; primary source Lee et al., 2008)

sec.method: volumetric productivity, review Table 2 (cited from Lee et al., 2008)

growth_records.cite: Zhang, Huifang et al. Clostridium acetobutylicum Biofilm: Advances in Understanding the Basis. Frontiers in Bioengineering and Biotechnology (2021). DOI:10.3389/fbioe.2021.658568. [PMC8209462]
growth_records.snippet: Table 2: C. beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 | Biofilm-immobilized cells, continuous fermentation | 13.4 g/L | 0.44 g/g | 0.40 g/L/h | Lee et al., 2008.
growth_records.notes: REVIEW-reproduced (Table 2), original: Lee et al., 2008. C. beijerinckii NCIMB 8052 biofilm continuous fermentation. Butanol titer 13.4 g/L, solvent yield 0.44 g/g, productivity 0.40 g/L/h. Dilution rate not restated in review. No growth rate or per-gDW data.
